All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BaseParsonsView
Abstract base class for Parsons problem views (solver and editor).
CodeBlock
 
CodeBlockTests
Unit tests for CodeBlock.
EditorView
View for a setter (instructor) to create, preview, edit, or delete a Parsons problem.
HomeController
 
HomeControllerTest
 
ICli
Interface enforcing the CLI run method for problem parsing.
IParsonsProblemsRepository
Repository interface for managing ParsonsProblem store data in any format of files.
ParsonsApplication
Entry point for the Parsons Problem Tool application.
ParsonsProblem
 
ParsonsProblemsService
Service layer for managing ParsonsProblem objects.
ParsonsProblemsServiceTests
Unit tests for ParsonsProblemsService.
ParsonsProblemTests
Unit tests for ParsonsProblem.
ProblemsList
Wrapper class representing a collection of ParsonsProblem objects.
RepositoryTests
Tests for XmlParsonsProblemsRepository.
SetterCli
Controller class for Problem setter, allows problem creation via CLI.
SetterCliTests
Test Class for SetterCli functionality.
SetterWelcomeView
SetterWelcomeView displays the list of Parsons problems for a problem setter.
SolverView
View for a student solving a single Parsons problem.
StudentWelcomeView
StudentWelcomeView displays the list of Parsons problems for a learner.
Utils
Shared constants and UI helper methods for all views in the Parsons Problems app.
WelcomeView
Abstract base class for the student and setter welcome views.
XmlParsonsProblemsRepository
